description: Search every public podcast conversation. Wraps the Podscan REST/Firehose/Exports APIs with mention monitoring, guest history, topic trend charts, idea sourcing, and sponsor intel — across 51M+ episodes, 4.4M+ podcasts.

novel_features.name: Mention monitoring
novel_features.description: Aggregate every podcast that mentioned a brand/term, ranked by audience reach with snippet of surrounding transcript.

novel_features.name: Guest history
novel_features.description: Find every podcast appearance of a person across the catalog, with optional quote-count for an include term.

novel_features.name: Topic trend chart
novel_features.description: Bucket episode mentions by week/month and render an ASCII trend chart for any term.

novel_features.name: Idea sourcing (asks)
novel_features.description: Extract question-shaped sentences from transcripts about a topic — startup-idea radar from public conversations.

novel_features.name: Sponsor competitor overlap
novel_features.description: Heuristic intersection of shows where a target brand and candidate brands both appear — competitive media planning.

novel_features.name: Standing watch
novel_features.description: Manage Podscan Firehose alerts as standing brand-mention watches.
